channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: GCC States Display Public Unity Amid Internal Differences in Response to Iran
item.description: On April 28, 2026, representatives of the Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) gathered in Jeddah, Saudi Arabia, to present a unified stance against Iran amid ongoing regional conflict. The summit emphasize...

item.title: Suvendu Adhikari wins Bhabanipur, ending Mamata Banerjee's longtime control
item.description: In a significant political development in West Bengal, Mamata Banerjee, the Chief Minister and leader of the Trinamool Congress, has lost the Bhabanipur constituency, which has long been considered he...

item.title: Bernice Ferreira to challenge Ellen Simwaka for IBO world junior lightweight title
item.description: Bernice 'The Badger' Ferreira, South Africa's national junior lightweight female boxing champion, is gearing up for a major challenge against Ellen 'The Tigress' Simwaka for the IBO world title. Haili...

item.title: Extreme Greenland Ice Melt Intensifies with Record Rates Since 1990
item.description: A new study led by the University of Barcelona reveals that Greenland's ice sheet is melting at unprecedented rates, with extreme melt events becoming more frequent, widespread, and intense. Since 199...

item.title: Petrol and diesel prices rise sharply in May amid international oil tensions
item.description: Fuel prices in South Africa are set to increase significantly in May, continuing a trend of rising costs for the second consecutive month. From Wednesday, the retail price of both grades of petrol wil...

item.title: China expresses concern over Philippine jetski activity and flag planting in West Philippine Sea
item.description: China has raised concerns over a recent Philippine activity in the West Philippine Sea, involving a jetski mission and the planting of the Philippine flag. Chinese authorities described these actions ...

item.title: The Importance of Wearing a Helmet While Skateboarding
item.description: Skateboarding is an exciting sport, but it carries the risk of head injuries, making wearing a helmet essential. The brain, a delicate and soft organ about the size of a melon, contains roughly 86 bil...

item.title: KNH Rolls Out Afya Apex System to Replace Paper Records with Fully Digital Operations
item.description: Kenyatta National Hospital (KNH) has kicked off a major transition to a fully digital healthcare system through a platform known as Afya Apex, marking a big step away from paper-based records that hav...

item.title: Arsenal’s Emirates Stadium Renamed for Champions League Games Against Atletico
item.description: Arsenal are set to host Atletico Madrid in the second leg of the Champions League semi-finals on Tuesday, May 5, but fans will notice that the Emirates Stadium will not carry its usual name. This is d...

item.title: Family Awaits DNA Results After Body Found in Nyambene Forest, Not Confirmed as Fredrick Gitije
item.description: The family of Fredrick Gitije, a teacher at Kindani Secondary School who went missing on December 23, 2025, has dismissed reports claiming he was found dead in Nyambene Forest, Igembe South Constituen...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV Highlights Peace and Human Dignity in First Year as Pontiff
item.description: Since his election on May 8, 2025, Pope Leo XIV, the first American pope, has emphasized themes of peace and human dignity as central to his pontificate. From his first public words quoting Christ, “P...

item.title: Kim Chiu shares her perspective on giving back for her birthday by offering free gas to motorists
item.description: Kim Chiu recently celebrated her birthday by giving back to the community in a unique way—by offering free gasoline to motorists in her hometown. The actress, who is known for her philanthropic effort...

item.title: Court Hearing for Stepfather of Missing Nova Scotia Children Rescheduled to July
item.description: The assault case against Daniel Martell, the stepfather of two missing children in Nova Scotia, has been postponed to July. Martell is scheduled to appear in provincial court in Pictou, Nova Scotia, o...

item.title: Thrissur Results: LDF Retains Majority Amidst Strong UDF Performance in Kerala
item.description: In the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, Thrissur district emerged as a notable exception to the broader anti-Left wave sweeping across the State. The Left Democratic Front (LDF) managed to secure nine ...

item.title: Gen Z Goliath Bradley Responds to Fan Greeting at Nairobi Pub
item.description: In Nairobi, influencer Bradley, popularly known as Gen Z Goliath, was involved in a tense exchange with a fan at a pub after a simple greeting sparked a confrontation. According to witnesses, the inci...

item.title: US calls for international support to secure shipping through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: The US military has deployed two guided-missile destroyers to the Gulf, aiming to break an Iranian blockade and ensure safe passage for commercial shipping through the strategic Strait of Hormuz. Two ...

item.title: IUML's A.K.M. Ashraf Wins Manjeswaram Seat with Significant Margin in 2026 Kerala Assembly Elections
item.description: In the 2026 Kerala Assembly elections, A.K.M. Ashraf, representing the Indian Union Muslim League (IUML) and the United Democratic Front (UDF), achieved a decisive victory in the Manjeswaram constitue...

item.title: Kim Kardashian reflects on her Met Gala fashion evolution ahead of 2026 event
item.description: Kim Kardashian has shared a retrospective of her Met Gala appearances, posting a series of throwback images on Instagram ahead of the 2026 event. The reality star and entrepreneur revisited over a dec...

item.title: MKP Reaffirms Commitment to Pro-Black Economic Policies After Meeting with AfriForum
item.description: The meeting between Jacob Zuma, leader of the Umkhonto weSizwe Party (MKP), and Kallie Kriel of AfriForum in Durban last week was focused on mutual issues such as mother tongue education, agricultural...

item.title: Dutch Artist Transforms Plastic Waste into Insect Sculptures to Highlight Environmental Loss
item.description: Dutch artist Henk Loorbach has created a striking art series called Litterbugs that transforms discarded plastic items into lifelike insect sculptures. Using materials collected from beaches such as b...
